englishDefinition: Use this polite greeting for a teacher; Dear Professor Lee.
chineseTranslation: 寫給教授或老師的禮貌開頭

englishDefinition: State the topic of the email; I am writing about the assignment.
chineseTranslation: 說明郵件主題；我寫信是關於……

word: I am writing to ask whether ...
englishDefinition: Introduce a polite yes-or-no question; I am writing to ask whether the date can change.
chineseTranslation: 禮貌提出是否可以的問題

englishDefinition: Make a polite request; Could you please send the file?
chineseTranslation: 禮貌提出請求；您可以……嗎

englishDefinition: Ask politely if an action can happen; Would it be possible to meet Friday?
chineseTranslation: 禮貌詢問某件事是否可行

englishDefinition: Make a formal polite request; I would appreciate it if you could reply.
chineseTranslation: 較正式的禮貌請求；若您能……我會很感激

englishDefinition: Explain a problem; I am having difficulty with the website.
chineseTranslation: 說明遇到的困難；我在……方面有問題

englishDefinition: Give a clear explanation; The reason is that I was ill.
Give a simple apology; I am sorry for the late reply.
chineseTranslation: 簡短道歉；對於……我很抱歉

englishDefinition: Use this when your action caused trouble
chineseTranslation: 若自己的行為造成麻煩可用此句致歉

englishDefinition: Introduce bad news politely; Unfortunately I cannot attend.
chineseTranslation: 禮貌引出壞消息；很遺憾……

englishDefinition: Ask for clearer information; Could you clarify the instructions?
Ask about a meeting time; Are you available on Tuesday?
chineseTranslation: 詢問對方某天或某時段是否有空

englishDefinition: Ask the reader to give information; Please let me know what time works.
Politely thank someone for reading or helping
chineseTranslation: 感謝對方花時間閱讀或協助

englishDefinition: Thank someone for accepting a difficult situation
chineseTranslation: 感謝對方體諒不便或特殊情況

word: I look forward to your reply.
englishDefinition: Politely say that you expect an answer
chineseTranslation: 禮貌表示期待對方回覆

englishDefinition: Use this polite closing before your name
chineseTranslation: 在署名前使用的禮貌結尾
